titleStmt.title: SII 38.199: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 199. (A.R. No. 199 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription contains an order of Vīranarasiṅgadēva alias Yādavarāyan to the tānattār of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḷavaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of in Puḻar-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷamaṇḍalam. It records that Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and its dēvadāna were previously declared tax-free but this arrangement was not properly implemented and certain taxes (puravari) were not remitted to the temple. Further the inscription states that on the representation of Aḻagar Ārūvan Sambandan to Vīranarasiṅgadēvan, the latter issued the present order and taxes such as veṭṭippuḍavai, tiraikāśu, taṟiṟai, kāttigaik-kāśu, vēlichchiṉṉam and fines such as kuṟṟatteṇḍam, paṭṭitteṇḍam and taxes collected from traders, vālmañjāḍi, kārttigaikkāśu, and miscellaneous other taxes collected from Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and its dēvamaṇḍala (villages), were ordered to be remitted to the temple treasury from the month of Āvaṇi onwards.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu viranāraciṅkatevaṉāṉa yātavarāyaṉ Olai .
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyārtiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāya
ṉār koyiṟtāṉattār kaṇṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūrun tevamaṇṭalamum muṟkālattile Iṟaṅkaleṉṉa Uṭaiyār tiruvo
ṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉār niṅkal Eṉṟu tiruveḻuttiṭṭaruḷiṉa Ivaiyiṟṟil cilapuṟavarikaḷ piṉpu cilanāḷ tuṭaṅkic
cellātey kiṭantaṉaveṉṟu Āṇṭār maruṅkūruṭaiyār Aḻakarāruran sambandhar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil nāya
ṉār tiruveḻuttiṭṭaruḷi niṅkalāṉapaṭiyey tevamaṇṭalattu veṭṭiy puṭavai mutal tiraikkācum Ācuvikaḷ perāṟ
kācum Uvaiccar perāṟ kuṭikkācum taṟiyiṟai yiṉavarikkācum vakainta kācu kāttikaikkācum velicciṉṉamum
Eḷḷu nilattilum parutti nilattilum veṭṭi Opāti kācum Eḷḷu nilattukkuc ciṟupāṭikāval Arimukkai Eḷḷum parutti nilattu
kkuc ciṟupāṭikāval Iraṭṭaikkācum kaṇkāṇi mānellum varaku keḻvaraku Uḻuntu payaṟu koḷḷun tiruvoṟṟiyūrilun teva
maṇṭalattiluṅ kuṟṟatteṇṭamum paṭṭitteṇṭamum tiruvoṟṟiyūr vāṇiyakkuṭimakkaḷ perāl vālmañcāṭi kārttikaikkācum civa
pputtoyppār perāṟ kaṭamaiyum Uppaḷattil Aricikkācum palaraiyum vakaintu koḷḷuṅ kārttikaikkācum maṟṟum tiruvo
ṟṟiyūrilun tevamaṇṭalattiluṅ kācuoṭṭukku Uṭalākakkoṇṭu varuvaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭai Āvaṇimāsa mutal
cantrātittavarai Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭāramāka viṭṭom Ippaṭikku kalliluñcempilum
veṭṭikkoḷvateṉṟu yātavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
